title: Family
overview: "An acting family plays the members of a family about to take their own lives in this heartbreaking celebration of the ordinary. (...) Performed at the stately pace of a slow piece of Bach, Familie is assured, soulful and unnerving." - The Guardian

trailers.title: Familie | Trailer |  Film Fest Gent 2020
